name: Pears Stuffed with Gorgonzola Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces imported gorgonzola, or other high-quality blue cheese
2 tablespoons crushed walnuts (or pistachio nuts or pine nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully peel the pears, leaving the stems attached.
2. Cut each pear in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds along with a scant tablespoon of pulp from each half.
3. Rub the cut sides with lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
4. Cream the gorgonzola cheese and butter together in a small bowl until they are soft and fluffy.
5. Fill the hollows of the pear halves with the cheese mixture.
6. Carefully stick the two halves of the pears back together again.
7. Roll the pears in the crushed nuts.
8. Chill for 2 hours, or until the cheese is firm.
